compressed_regions.summary: Multiple bulk-related backward and forward features exhibit extremely low cardinality with unique values=1 and very low cardinality ratios, indicating near-constant values across the partition.

notes: Features related to bulk traffic rates and flags with minimal variability

uncertainty_notes: Low cardinality may reflect measurement saturation or feature design
Near-constant values reduce feature expressiveness but do not exclude subtle conditional patterns

compressed_regions.summary: Several feature pairs exhibit perfect or near-perfect correlation (correlation=1 or ~0.9993), indicating strong linear dependencies and potential redundancy.

locality.scope_value: Bwd Packet Length Mean|Avg Bwd Segment Size|Fwd Header Length|Fwd Header Length.1|Fwd PSH Flags|SYN Flag Count|Fwd Packet Length Mean|Avg Fwd Segment Size|RST Flag Count|ECE Flag Count|Total Backward Packets|Subflow Bwd Packets|Total Fwd Packets|Subflow Fwd Packets|Total Length of Bwd Packets|Subflow Bwd Bytes|Total Length of Fwd Packets|Subflow Fwd Bytes|Packet Length Mean|Average Packet Size
notes: Strongly correlated feature pairs across packet length, flag counts, and subflow metrics

uncertainty_notes: Perfect correlations may reflect feature derivations or duplications
Redundancy may affect model stability or interpretability

compressed_regions.summary: Several packet length and size features show significant class-conditioned structural variation with high variance ratios and differing unique value counts between BENIGN and DDoS classes.
uncertainty_notes: Variance ratios indicate distributional shifts but do not guarantee stable predictive patterns
Unique value disparities may reflect sampling or measurement biases

compressed_regions.summary: Destination Port feature shows strong distributional differences between BENIGN and DDoS classes, with DDoS class dominated by a single port and zero entropy, while BENIGN class has higher entropy and lower dominant ratio.

notes: Feature sensitive to class representation differences

uncertainty_notes: Distributional skew may reflect attack targeting specific ports
High JS divergence indicates strong class separability but may also reflect dataset bias

compressed_regions.summary: Partition overview reports moderate class imbalance and presence of duplicated rows, which may influence feature distributions and downstream analysis.

notes: Partition-level data quality and class distribution observations

uncertainty_notes: Duplicated rows may bias feature statistics and model training
Class imbalance is moderate but may affect class representation
